Duke.note: Caleb Foster out (foot fracture), Ngongba questionable. 7-man rotation.

Texas Tech.note: JT Toppin torn ACL, lost 3 straight, now a jump-shooting team.

Kentucky.note: Quaintance doubtful (knee, 4 games all season), lost 5 of last 7 regular season games.

North Carolina.note: Caleb Wilson out for season (broken thumb). Missing All-ACC first-team selection.

BYU.note: Richie Saunders out. AJ Dybantsa must carry heavier load.

UCLA.note: Bilodeau (knee) and Dent (calf) banged up from Big Ten tournament.

UConn.note: Lost last 2 games including 20-pt blowout in Big East final. Cold entering tourney.

Clemson.note: Starting lineup injury concern entering tournament.
